profile.name: Zach Schneider
profile.title: Cosmic Code Crusader
profile.about: Hi there! I'm Zach, a full-stack developer with a passion for building beautiful, functional websites. I've worked in the tech industry for over a decade and have had the opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects, from small business websites to large-scale web applications. In my free time, I enjoy keeping up with the latest developments in web development and spending time with my family. I'm always looking for new challenges and opportunities to learn and grow as a developer.

contact.message: I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities and projects.
